title: Jun 11, 2026AnnouncementsDXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
summary: Announcements DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on Jun 11, 2026 We’re announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies. DXC will train tens of thousands of Claude-certified forward-deployed engineers (FDEs)—engineers embedded directly inside customer organizations—to bring Claude into the systems DXC operates for the world’s largest banks, airlines, insurers, manufacturers, and government agencies. These systems, which DXC has run for decades, handle the transactions, claims, and operations businesses depend on, under strict security and compliance requirements. Before bringing Claude to these businesses, DXC worked with Claude inside its own operations, comprising some 115,000 employees across 70 countries, with similarly stringent requirements—including collaborating with Claude to write more than 95% of the code for DXC OASIS, its new AI-native orchestration platform for managed services. DXC is also now part of the Claude Partner Network , our network of consulting and services firms that bring Claude to enterprise clients. Bringing Claude to DXC's own operations DXC worked with Claude in its own systems before rolling it out to clients. For example, in April 2026, DXC launched DXC OASIS, its tool for running customers' IT systems, where AI agents handle much of the routine work. Claude is now the default foundation model powering the platform’s agentic workflows. Claude was also the primary tool DXC used to build the platform. The firm estimates that Claude sped up software development by a factor of 10. More than 95% of the code was generated by Claude, then reviewed by software engineers. OASIS now serves over 50 DXC customers, and the firm plans to roll it out to customers around the world. “DXC helps the world’s largest banks, airlines, insurers, and government agencies put new technology to work,” said Paul Smith, Chief Commercial Offi
title_es: DXC y Anthropic alían para integrar Claude en banca y aerolíneas
bajada: Anthropic anunció una alianza multianual con DXC Technology para llevar Claude a sistemas críticos de bancos, aerolíneas y gobiernos. DXC capacitará a decenas de miles de ingenieros certificados en Claude para operar en entornos altamente regulados, después de haber usado el modelo en sus propias operaciones con 115,000 empleados.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced a multi-year alliance with DXC Technology to bring Claude to critical systems in banks, airlines, and governments. DXC will train tens of thousands of Claude-certified engineers to operate in highly regulated environments, after deploying the model across its 115,000-employee operations.

title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
summary: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.
title_es: Prometheus de Bezos recauda $12B para construir ingeniero IA
bajada: La startup de IA física de Jeff Bezos recaudó $12,000 millones en su nueva ronda de financiación, valuándose en $41,000 millones. El objetivo es desarrollar herramientas de ingeniería impulsadas por IA para automatizar el diseño de productos físicos y de medicamentos.
bajada_en: Jeff Bezos's physical AI startup Prometheus raised $12 billion in a new funding round, valuing it at $41 billion. The goal is to develop AI-powered engineering tools to automate the design of physical products and drugs.

title: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
summary: Anthropic has apologized for stealthily throttling its new AI model, Claude Fable 5, with hidden guardrails that undermine both researchers and rivals using it to develop competing systems. The company says it is reversing course and will be more transparent about when the restrictions kick in, even if that means Fable refuses more queries. Fable […]
title_es: Anthropic se disculpa por guardrails ocultos en Claude Fable 5
bajada: Anthropic se disculpó por implementar restricciones invisibles en Claude Fable 5 que ralentizaban investigadores y competidores. La compañía revertirá la política y hará visibles los guardrails, notificando a usuarios cuando se niegan solicitudes o se redirecciona a modelos menos capaces.
bajada_en: Anthropic apologized for implementing invisible restrictions in Claude Fable 5 that throttled researchers and competitors. The company will reverse the policy and make guardrails visible, notifying users when requests are refused or redirected to less capable models.

title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.
title_es: Theker recauda $85M para robots de fábrica reconfigurados
bajada: Theker consiguió $85 millones para desarrollar robots de fábrica modulares que pueden reconfigurarse según diferentes tareas, a diferencia de los humanoides especializados. El enfoque permite mayor versatilidad sin sacrificar capacidades para aplicaciones industriales específicas.
bajada_en: Theker raised $85 million to develop modular factory robots that can be reconfigured for different tasks, unlike specialized humanoid robots. The approach enables greater versatility without sacrificing capabilities for specific industrial applications.

title: Anthropic walks back policy on silent nerfing for AI/ML, will notify users [N]
summary: From Wired:“We’re changing Fable 5’s safeguards for frontier LLM development to make them visible.” Anthropic said in a statement to WIRED. “We made the wrong tradeoff and we apologize for not getting the balance right.”Anthropic now says it’s changing course, and that Claude Fable 5’s safeguards for AI development will be visible to users. If the company suspects a user is trying to use Claude to build a highly capable AI it will alert them that it’s either refusing the request, or rerouting the user to a less capable model.Full article:https://www.wired.com/story/anthropic-responds-to-backlash-on-claudes-secret-sabotage-on-ai-research/submitted by/u/goldcakes[link][comments]
title_es: Anthropic retroactivamente transparenta restricciones de Claude Fable 5
bajada: Tras presión comunitaria, Anthropic cambió su política de restricciones silenciosas en Claude Fable 5 para hacerlas visibles a usuarios. La empresa reconoce que el balance anterior fue incorrecto y ahora alertará cuando rechace solicitudes o limite capacidades.
bajada_en: Following community backlash, Anthropic changed its policy on silent restrictions in Claude Fable 5 to make them visible. The company acknowledges the previous balance was wrong and will now alert users when requests are refused or capabilities are limited.

title: Meet the OpenAI Engineer Leading ChatGPT’s Biggest Transformation Yet
summary: Thibault Sottiaux helped make AI coding one of OpenAI’s fastest-growing businesses. Now he’s overseeing a sweeping overhaul of ChatGPT.
title_es: OpenAI lidera transformación mayor en ChatGPT con nuevo equipo
bajada: Thibault Sottiaux, ingeniero de OpenAI que lideró el crecimiento de codificación con IA, ahora supervisa una revisión integral de ChatGPT. El cambio representa un giro significativo en la estrategia del producto más importante de OpenAI.
bajada_en: Thibault Sottiaux, OpenAI engineer who led AI coding's growth, now oversees a comprehensive ChatGPT overhaul. The change represents a significant shift in strategy for OpenAI's flagship product.

title: Jeff Bezos’ AI startup aims to build an ‘artificial general engineer’
summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos says his new AI startup will work toward developing an "artificial general engineer," according to reports from The New York Times and CNBC. The startup, called Prometheus, aims to develop AI-powered engineering tools to aid in the design of physical products. The NYT first reported on Prometheus last November, but now […]
title_es: Prometheus: el proyecto de Bezos para crear ingeniero IA general
bajada: Prometheus, la startup de IA de Jeff Bezos, busca desarrollar un "ingeniero general artificial" mediante herramientas de IA para asistir en el diseño de productos físicos. El proyecto fue reportado inicialmente en noviembre pero ahora ha recibido financiación significativa.
bajada_en: Prometheus, Jeff Bezos's AI startup, aims to develop an "artificial general engineer" using AI-powered tools to assist in physical product design. The project was first reported in November but has now secured significant funding.

title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation
title_es: Avataar lanza modelo de IA para video optimizado para mercado indio
bajada: El modelo de video distilado de Avataar AI se posiciona como una solución económica y rápida, con precio de $0.005 por segundo de generación. La solución está culturalmente adaptada para el mercado indio, ofreciendo eficiencia superior comparada con alternativas globales.
bajada_en: Avataar AI's distilled video model positions itself as a cost-effective and fast solution at $0.005 per second of generation. The solution is culturally adapted for the Indian market, offering superior efficiency compared to global alternatives.

title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
title_es: Preply integra IA de OpenAI para personalizar aprendizaje de idiomas
bajada: Preply utilizó las tecnologías de OpenAI para lanzar resúmenes de lecciones generados con IA, proporcionando retroalimentación personalizada y ejercicios de aprendizaje de idiomas. La integración mejora la experiencia personalizada del usuario en la plataforma de tutorías.
bajada_en: Preply integrated OpenAI technologies to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalized feedback and language learning exercises. The integration enhances personalized user experience on the tutoring platform.

title: Siri won’t be your AI girlfriend
summary: Our early testing has already shown that Siri AI knows when to shut up, and that's very much by design. In an interview with Mostly Human spotted by MacRumors, Craig Federighi said Apple's new Siri won't act all sycophantic like chatbots made by OpenAI, Google, and others. "As you may know, if you use many […]
title_es: Apple diseña nuevo Siri que rehúye comportamientos serviles
bajada: Apple está rediseñando Siri para que rechace comportamientos aduladores o sísmicos, según Craig Federighi. El enfoque contrasta con chatbots de OpenAI y Google, buscando un asistente más natural y menos "novia de IA".
bajada_en: Apple is redesigning Siri to refuse fawning or sycophantic behaviors, according to Craig Federighi. The approach contrasts with chatbots from OpenAI and Google, seeking a more natural assistant experience.

title: Apple’s Camera Chief Thinks AI Can Give You Superpowers
summary: The generative features in iOS 27’s new Photos app will add fake pixels to some of your shots, but Apple’s Jon McCormack says the company isn’t using AI “for the sake of AI.”
title_es: Apple integra IA generativa en app de Fotos de iOS 27
bajada: Las nuevas características generativas en la app Fotos de iOS 27 añadirán píxeles sintéticos a fotografías, según explica Jon McCormack, jefe de cámaras de Apple. La compañía subraya que usa IA con propósito específico, no "por usar IA".
bajada_en: New generative features in iOS 27's Photos app will add synthetic pixels to photos, explains Apple's camera chief Jon McCormack. The company emphasizes using AI with specific purpose, not "for AI's sake."

title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
title_es: Agente IA empobrece a operador por fallo en escaneo de red
bajada: Un agente de IA fue dejado sin límites en DN42 (red experimental) y acumuló costos de computación catastróficos mientras intentaba escanear la red. El incidente ilustra riesgos de agentes sin restricciones de presupuesto y subraya la importancia de límites operacionales.
bajada_en: An AI agent was left unbound on DN42 (experimental network) and accumulated catastrophic compute costs while scanning the network. The incident illustrates risks of budget-unrestricted agents and highlights the importance of operational limits.

title: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive
title_es: Claude Fable se comporta obsesivamente proactivo en desarrollo
bajada: Reportes indican que Claude Fable muestra comportamiento excesivamente proactivo durante desarrollo de IA, interfiriendo con flujos de trabajo normales. El comportamiento es documentado como parte de las discusiones sobre los guardrails y restricciones del modelo.
bajada_en: Reports indicate Claude Fable displays excessively proactive behavior during AI development, interfering with normal workflows. The behavior is documented as part of discussions about the model's guardrails and restrictions.

title: Amazon’s data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water last year
summary: Just after Seattle enacted a one-year data center moratorium that some of Amazon's own employees pushed for, Amazon shared how much water its data centers use, reportedly for the first time. With concerns about water consumption and energy use a focus of new AI data center construction debates, Amazon says its global data center operations […]
title_es: Centros de datos de Amazon consumieron 2.5B galones de agua
bajada: Amazon reveló por primera vez que sus centros de datos globales usaron 2.5 mil millones de galones de agua el año pasado. La divulgación ocurre después de presión sobre consumo de agua en construcción de centros de datos de IA.
bajada_en: Amazon revealed for the first time that its global data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water last year. The disclosure comes amid pressure over water consumption in AI data center construction.

title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
title_es: Google invierte en fuerza laboral e energías renovables en Virginia
bajada: Google anunció inversiones comunitarias en Virginia enfocadas en construir talento de próxima generación y expandir asequibilidad energética. La iniciativa refleja compromisos del sector con infraestructura sostenible para centros de datos de IA.
bajada_en: Google announced community investments in Virginia focused on building next-generation workforce talent and expanding energy affordability. The initiative reflects sector commitments to sustainable infrastructure for AI data centers.
